flavor: Pokémon-structure cards (types + signature moves) for Dungeon Tester — Lost Brothers chrome/spirit tone, original art only.

whip-hand-thug.name: Whip-Hand Thug
whip-hand-thug.blurb: A dusty overseer with a knotted leather scourge.

moves.name: Heel Freeze
moves.blurb: A crack that pins feet to dust.

moves.name: Overseer Grin
moves.blurb: He likes the sound of fear.

coffle-guard.name: Coffle Guard
coffle-guard.blurb: Iron manacle keys jingle at his belt.

thorn-clan-skirmisher.name: Thorn-Clan Skirmisher
thorn-clan-skirmisher.blurb: A hill-orc in bark-lacquered hide, smiling with broken tusks.

dust-trail-warg.name: Dust-Trail Warg
dust-trail-warg.blurb: A lean wolf-beast with chalk-dust in its fur.

trail-webling.name: Trail Webling
trail-webling.blurb: A pale spider the size of a hound, silk trailing from the pines.

bond-chain-enforcer.name: Bond-Chain Enforcer
bond-chain-enforcer.blurb: Carries manacles like a trophy belt.

ash-gut-raider.name: Ash-Gut Raider
ash-gut-raider.blurb: An orc whose war-paint looks like burnt prairie.

night-howler.name: Night-Howler
night-howler.blurb: Yellow eyes in the scrub; the pack answers from the ridge.

silk-widow.name: Silk Widow
silk-widow.blurb: Eight legs lacquered like wet tar; webs choke the hollow.

bridge-brute.name: Bridge Brute
bridge-brute.blurb: A squat troll under the stone arch, hungry for tolls.

orc-rider.name: Thorn-Clan Rider
orc-rider.blurb: Orc and warg as one mean silhouette against the dusk.

red-maw-hunter.name: Red-Maw Hunter
red-maw-hunter.blurb: A warg alpha with a stained snout and patient gait.

cave-knuckle.name: Cave Knuckle
cave-knuckle.blurb: A cave-troll knuckling forward on stone-scarred fists.

nest-mother.name: Nest Mother
nest-mother.blurb: The hollow's queen: silk thick as cable, eyes like wet pearls.

iron-cuff-overseer.name: Iron-Cuff Overseer
iron-cuff-overseer.blurb: Frontier steel and orcish cruelty — the whip still speaks.

ash-cloak-outrider.name: Ash-Cloak Outrider
ash-cloak-outrider.blurb: A veiled rider on a pale steed — rumors of a pale host.

mountain-hammer.name: Mountain Hammer
mountain-hammer.blurb: A high-pass troll with a tree for a club.

bone-drum-captain.name: Bone-Drum Captain
bone-drum-captain.blurb: War-drums of hide and bone call the Thorn-Clan to charge.

pale-host-scout.name: Pale-Host Scout
pale-host-scout.blurb: Cloaked, cold, and certain — a forerunner of the ash riders.

warcamp-berserker.name: Warcamp Berserker
warcamp-berserker.blurb: An orc who abandoned shields for two serrated cleavers.

gloomwood-spinner.name: Gloomwood Spinner
gloomwood-spinner.blurb: Webs that dim torchlight; venom that slows the draw.

chain-lord-lieutenant.name: Chain-Lord Lieutenant
chain-lord-lieutenant.blurb: Keeps the bondage ledgers and the gunbelt alike.

shadow-pack-alpha.name: Shadow-Pack Alpha
shadow-pack-alpha.blurb: Wargs that move like smoke through the liberation lines.

citadel-gate-brute.name: Citadel Gate Brute
citadel-gate-brute.blurb: A troll chained as a living door-ram.

pale-ember-moth.name: Pale Ember Moth
pale-ember-moth.blurb: A man-sized moth whose wings shed cold sparks over the bedrolls.

grave-mist-hound.name: Grave-Mist Hound
grave-mist-hound.blurb: Fog takes the shape of a hunting dog — then the teeth get solid.

camp-thief-gremlin.name: Camp-Thief Gremlin
camp-thief-gremlin.blurb: Tiny claws, big appetite for boots, gold, and sleep.

moon-silk-spinner.name: Moon-Silk Spinner
moon-silk-spinner.blurb: Silver thread drifts from the dark pines and wraps ankles first.

ash-wisp-stalker.name: Ash-Wisp Stalker
ash-wisp-stalker.blurb: A cloak of cinders with no body — until it reaches for your throat.

coffle-shade.name: Coffle Shade
coffle-shade.blurb: Manacle-ghost of a thrall who never got free of the Chain-Road.

ridge-bat-swarm.name: Ridge Bat Swarm
ridge-bat-swarm.blurb: A shrieking cloud of wings that blot the campfire stars.

dream-tickler.name: Dream-Tickler
dream-tickler.blurb: It crawls into nightmares and wakes you by biting the fear.

night-howler-lurker.name: Night-Howler
night-howler-lurker.blurb: The classic trail predator — eyes like coals just past the firelight.

cold-iron-haunt.name: Cold-Iron Haunt
cold-iron-haunt.blurb: A towering silhouette of frost and scrap metal that hates warm blood.

boss-coffle-master.name: Coffle Master Vorn
boss-coffle-master.blurb: The first whip that named you property.

boss-thorn-warlord.name: Thorn-Clan Warlord
boss-thorn-warlord.blurb: Drums of bone, banners of ash.

boss-ash-herald.name: Ash-Cloak Herald
boss-ash-herald.blurb: Pale host banner-bearer; silence rides with him.

boss-chain-lord.name: The Chain-Lord
boss-chain-lord.blurb: Frontier baron of bondage — the debt that ends here.

moves.name: Iron Sentence
moves.blurb: Chains slam shut around the heart.

dog-companion.name: Trail Hound
dog-companion.blurb: True grit on four legs — Helix chrome in the bark.

moves.name: Helping Hound
moves.blurb: A bark that buys a breath.

moves.name: Camp Loyalty
moves.blurb: Takes a chunk so you don't have to.

neon-glade-jackal.name: Neon Glade Jackal
neon-glade-jackal.blurb: Eyes like cheap LEDs in wet fur.

fiber-oak-drifter.name: Fiber-Oak Drifter
fiber-oak-drifter.blurb: A scav with bark-chip armor and a stolen vibroknife.

humming-sap-thief.name: Humming Sap Thief
humming-sap-thief.blurb: Steals biolume resin that screams when cut.

barcode-mite.name: Barcode Mite
barcode-mite.blurb: Skitters under skin-lines looking for SKUs to rewrite.

stim-dust-gnat.name: Stim Dust Gnat
stim-dust-gnat.blurb: Cloud of buzzing needles that smell like burnt coffee.

quill-flask-ruffian.name: Quill-Flask Ruffian
quill-flask-ruffian.blurb: Drinks courage from a marshal's leftover flask.

pale-pixel-sprite.name: Pale Pixel Sprite
pale-pixel-sprite.blurb: A spirit made of broken hologram glass.

chain-moss-goblin.name: Chain-Moss Goblin
chain-moss-goblin.blurb: Wears rusted links like a second spine.

widowmere-lurker.name: Widowmere Lurker
widowmere-lurker.blurb: Fishes drowned drones from a black lake.

sku-brand-runner.name: SKU Brand Runner
sku-brand-runner.blurb: Sprints east with a hot iron and a warrant slate.

warrant-paper-kite.name: Warrant Paper Kite
warrant-paper-kite.blurb: Folded legal paper that cuts like glass when thrown.

hill-signal-goblin.name: Hill Signal Goblin
hill-signal-goblin.blurb: Jams radios with a bone antenna.

stim-cartel-hound.name: Stim Cartel Hound
stim-cartel-hound.blurb: Trained to smell fear and uncut powder.

debt-collector-drone.name: Debt Collector Drone
debt-collector-drone.blurb: Hover-blade that prints late fees in blood.

ashfen-reed-serpent.name: Ashfen Reed Serpent
ashfen-reed-serpent.blurb: Coils through marsh fiber like a living cable.

trace-crow.name: Trace Crow
trace-crow.blurb: Steals barcodes off the living and sells them upstream.

bounty-glyph-thief.name: Bounty Glyph Thief
bounty-glyph-thief.blurb: Cuts seals off necks for scrap chrome.

mire-lantern-imp.name: Mire Lantern Imp
mire-lantern-imp.blurb: Carries a false Helix smile on a stick.

chromeveil-barnacle.name: Chromeveil Barnacle
chromeveil-barnacle.blurb: Clings to barge hulls and drinks coolant dreams.

spirit-jar-breaker.name: Spirit Jar Breaker
spirit-jar-breaker.blurb: Smashes cages so the ghosts owe him favors.

coolant-river-eel.name: Coolant River Eel
coolant-river-eel.blurb: Biolume stripes; bites leave frostburn code.

barge-hook-orc.name: Barge Hook Orc
barge-hook-orc.blurb: Pulls freighters onto decks with a chrome gaff.

toll-booth-specter.name: Toll Booth Specter
toll-booth-specter.blurb: Demands coin from memories you haven't remembered yet.

muckfen-silk-drake.name: Muckfen Silk Drake
muckfen-silk-drake.blurb: Small dragon-thing; webs smell like solvent.

helix-smile-sentry.name: Helix Smile Sentry
helix-smile-sentry.blurb: Gate mask that never stops grinning.

wicker-code-sentry.name: Wicker Code Sentry
wicker-code-sentry.blurb: Reed and wire woven into a walking firewall.

mire-orc-shaman.name: Mire Orc Shaman
mire-orc-shaman.blurb: Burns stim as incense for a swamp god that pays in static.

director-vale-clerk.name: Director Vale Clerk
director-vale-clerk.blurb: Soft hands, hard stamps, worse secrets.

palefen-diver.name: Palefen Diver
palefen-diver.blurb: Surfaces with drowned drones and worse news.

numbered-bed-ghost.name: Numbered Bed Ghost
numbered-bed-ghost.blurb: Sits where a guest used to sleep; wears their number.

house-blade-duelist.name: House Blade Duelist
house-blade-duelist.blurb: Polite steel until the smiles stop.

ring-forge-golem.name: Ring Forge Golem
ring-forge-golem.blurb: Walks on cooling seals still glowing orange.

collar-yard-overseer.name: Collar Yard Overseer
collar-yard-overseer.blurb: Clipboard of names that aren't yours yet.

lyra-echo-shade.name: Lyra Echo Shade
lyra-echo-shade.blurb: Wears a sister's outline like borrowed armor.

seal-breaker-cultist.name: Seal Breaker Cultist
seal-breaker-cultist.blurb: Prays to cracked rings and broken SKUs.

helix-archivist.name: Helix Archivist
helix-archivist.blurb: Files living people under pending deletion.

estate-drone-swarm.name: Estate Drone Swarm
estate-drone-swarm.blurb: A cloud of tiny smiles with blades.

pit-mandolin-fiend.name: Pit Mandolin Fiend
pit-mandolin-fiend.blurb: Keeps time while the crowd bets on blood.

undervault-gladiator.name: Undervault Gladiator
undervault-gladiator.blurb: Neon scars, chrome knuckles, no real name.

bone-drum-prospect.name: Bone Drum Prospect
bone-drum-prospect.blurb: Auditioning for the captain's chair with your ribs.

arena-silk-brute.name: Arena Silk Brute
arena-silk-brute.blurb: Wrapped in betting tickets and spider silk.

cade-betting-knight.name: Cade Betting Knight
cade-betting-knight.blurb: Armor paid for in other people's futures.

neon-pit-drake.name: Neon Pit Drake
neon-pit-drake.blurb: Small dragon raised on stim and screams.

fight-club-shade.name: Fight Club Shade
fight-club-shade.blurb: You don't talk about it; it talks about you.

undervault-handler.name: Undervault Handler
undervault-handler.blurb: Leashes champions like dogs and dogs like champions.

spirefall-militia-orc.name: Spirefall Militia Orc
spirefall-militia-orc.blurb: Burned tower paint still wet on the shield.

tower-guard-elite.name: Tower Guard Elite
tower-guard-elite.blurb: Last standing smile at a falling Helix spire.

uprising-chain-breaker.name: Uprising Chain Breaker
uprising-chain-breaker.blurb: Fights for freeholds—or for whoever pays in seals.

warg-cavalry-outrider.name: Warg Cavalry Outrider
warg-cavalry-outrider.blurb: Rides smoke and teeth into the grid.

spire-drone-ace.name: Spire Drone Ace
spire-drone-ace.blurb: Pilots a dying tower like a gun.

ash-crop-reaver.name: Ash Crop Reaver
ash-crop-reaver.blurb: Harvests uprising like it was stim.

liberation-false-flag.name: Liberation False Flag
liberation-false-flag.blurb: Wears both sides until the knives come out.

dragon-drop-scout.name: Dragon Drop Scout
dragon-drop-scout.blurb: Signals the big wings with a neon flare.

dt-frontier-revolver.name: Frontier Revolver
dt-frontier-revolver.blurb: Six chambers of dusty justice — fantasy powder and all.

dt-ranch-carbine.name: Ranch Carbine
dt-ranch-carbine.blurb: Short-barreled trail gun for saddles and ambushes.

dt-stock-whip.name: Stock Whip
dt-stock-whip.blurb: Once used on captives. Now aimed at the overseers.

dt-iron-hatchet.name: Iron Hatchet
dt-iron-hatchet.blurb: Camp tool, throat tool — same edge.

dt-ashwood-spear.name: Ashwood Spear
dt-ashwood-spear.blurb: Long reach for wargs and riders.

dt-yew-shortbow.name: Yew Shortbow
dt-yew-shortbow.blurb: Quiet as hope on the pine road.

dt-moonsteel-saber.name: Moonsteel Saber
dt-moonsteel-saber.blurb: A curve of pale steel that sings in cold mist.

dt-ashwood-longbow.name: Ashwood Longbow
dt-ashwood-longbow.blurb: Drawn like a prayer across the ridge wind.

dt-bone-drum-cleaver.name: Bone-Drum Cleaver
dt-bone-drum-cleaver.blurb: Forged to the beat of Thorn-Clan war drums.

dt-ash-veil-revolver.name: Ash-Veil Revolver
dt-ash-veil-revolver.blurb: Chambers that smoke pale after every shot.

dt-wilderland-oathblade.name: Wilderland Oathblade
dt-wilderland-oathblade.blurb: Steel sworn to every name you free along the road.

dt-neon-switchblade.name: Neon Switchblade
dt-neon-switchblade.blurb: Folds quiet; unfolds bright and mean.

dt-fiber-oak-bat.name: Fiber-Oak Bat
dt-fiber-oak-bat.blurb: Biolume sap still sticky on the grain.

dt-barcode-razor.name: Barcode Razor
dt-barcode-razor.blurb: Cuts SKUs and throats with equal boredom.

dt-helix-smile-baton.name: Helix Smile Baton
dt-helix-smile-baton.blurb: Gate cops grin while they break ribs.

dt-pit-chrome-gauntlet.name: Pit Chrome Gauntlet
dt-pit-chrome-gauntlet.blurb: One punch, then the crowd decides.

dt-spire-railgun.name: Spire Rail Spike
dt-spire-railgun.blurb: Tower scrap turned into a bad idea that works.

dt-gridfire-machete.name: Gridfire Machete
dt-gridfire-machete.blurb: Still warm from a burning server farm.

dt-ash-horizon-rifle.name: Ash Horizon Rifle
dt-ash-horizon-rifle.blurb: Shoots west until the name comes back.

dt-memory-shade-dagger.name: Memory Shade Dagger
dt-memory-shade-dagger.blurb: Looks like your brother's knife. Isn't.

dt-helix-director-cane.name: Helix Director Cane
dt-helix-director-cane.blurb: Vale smiled when she swung it.

dt-free-horizon-revolver.name: Free Horizon Revolver
dt-free-horizon-revolver.blurb: Last chamber saved for the road home.

dt-unarmed-grit.name: Bare Knuckles
dt-unarmed-grit.blurb: No steel — just scar tissue and bad decisions.
